description: Coax vs faithful prompt lift for GPT-4o on 100 clean items (idx50-149), detail=high; paired vs E0-repro faithful
command: python eval_closed_gpt.py --model gpt-4o-2024-11-20 --prompt coax --detail high --data data/closed_ended_clean.parquet --start 50 --limit 100 --exp E-prompt-axis --paper-section §5.1-adjacent --description Coax vs faithful prompt lift for GPT-4o on 100 clean items (idx50-149), detail=high; paired vs E0-repro faithful --out results/closed_ended/prompt_axis/gpt-4o-2024-11-20__coax-direct-k0__clean__idx50-149.csv
